name: Docker Build Cloud
description: Docker Inc's managed remote BuildKit service. Same idea as Depot — buildx-compatible cloud builders with persistent cache. $0.04/min after the included tier (500 min on Team, 1500 on Business). The HTTP API surface is the standard Docker Hub API extended with build-cloud endpoints; auth is a Docker Hub PAT.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Docker Hub PAT
credential_fields.description: Personal access token from hub.docker.com → Account Settings → Security

credential_fields.name: namespace
credential_fields.label: Namespace
credential_fields.description: Docker Hub org / user namespace that owns the cloud builders

tools.name: list_builders
tools.description: List cloud builders for a namespace. Args: namespace.

tools.name: create_builder
tools.description: Provision a cloud builder. Args: name, region (us-east-1|eu-west-1|ap-southeast-1), instance_type? (small|medium|large).

tools.name: delete_builder
tools.description: Delete a cloud builder. Args: name.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Get build-minute usage for the current billing period. Args: period? (current|last|YYYY-MM).

tools.name: list_repositories
tools.description: List image repositories the builder can push to. Args: namespace.
